system.effect: The psyker projects a searing beam of concentrated warp heat at a single target. The beam deals 2d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with Pen equal to twice the psyker's Psy Rating and the Melta quality.

description.value: The psyker focuses an intense beam of pyrokinetic energy at a single target, hot enough to melt through ceramite and plasteel. The beam deals 2d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with Penetration equal to twice the psyker's Psy Rating and the Melta quality. At close range, this power is devastating to vehicles and heavily armoured targets.
